_comment: Audition patch for ElaboratedPhraseStrategy Phase 1. The strategy builds (or accepts) a skeleton MelodicFigure, walks each anchor, and per anchor randomly picks Leave (single-note figure at anchor pitch) or Generate (RFB-built figure of matching duration). Output Phrase has N figures + N FCs with leadStep math FC[0]=0; FC[i>0] = skel.step[i] - prev_net_step. Render: build/tools/mforce_cli/Debug/mforce_cli.exe --compose patches/PluckU.json renders/elaborated 1 --template patches/test_elaborated.json

Main._comment: Two phrases. Each is 8 beats. Phrase 1 uses a literal skeleton so you can predict the structural backbone; phrase 2 lets RFB build the skeleton.

phrases._comment: Phrase 1: literal C-D-E-D skeleton as halves (4 anchors, 8 beats, ascending then back). Random Leave/Generate per anchor. Seeded.
phrases.name: literal_skel

phrases._comment: Phrase 2: RFB-built skeleton. defaultPulse 2.0 + buildCount 4 = 8-beat skeleton with 4 anchors of 2 beats each. RFB picks the pitch contour. Random elaboration on top.
phrases.name: rfb_skel
